source: Built from official bulk sources: goarmy cmtjobs servlet, airforce.com careers API, NAVMC 1200.1L, and DoD COOL. No figure inferred; missing fields are absent, not invented. Pay is deliberately excluded — it is a function of paygrade, not of the job.

specialties.code: UNVERIFIED - no confirmed numeric Space Force Specialty Code (SFSC) was found this session. The official spaceforce.mil SFSC crosswalk PDF returns HTTP 403 on fetch, consistent with data/interest-taxonomy.json's prior finding. One low-confidence search summary returned a code ('3D1X2') that appears to conflate an Air Force AFSC with a Space Force-specific code; it is NOT used here per the no-fabrication rule. Do not publish a numeric code for this record until independently confirmed against a live spaceforce.mil/af.mil source.
specialties.name: Cyber Operations
specialties.what_it_is: U.S. citizenship required. Space Force is a single-component force with no Guard/Reserve equivalent - see retirement.guard_reserve_points_note below.

entry_requirements.asvab_line_score: General (G) composite reported in the range of 60-64 depending on the specific cyber role; the official spaceforce.com fetch itself states the exact threshold 'varies by specialty' without giving one definitive number. Not independently cross-confirmed against a second primary source this session.
entry_requirements.security_clearance: At minimum a National Agency Check with Local Agency Check and Credit Check; a Single Scope Background Investigation (SSBI) is also referenced for this field. The exact clearance tier (Secret vs. TS/SCI) for a specific cyber billet was not independently confirmed this session. Source: spaceforce.com official fetch. This is a hard requirement independent of ASVAB score: per SEAD 4 (the government-wide National Security Adjudicative Guidelines), common disqualifiers include foreign influence/preference (close foreign-national contacts, dual citizenship, foreign-government ties), financial considerations (unresolved delinquent debt, bankruptcy pattern, tax delinquency), and drug involvement/substance misuse (recent illegal drug use or a pattern of misuse) - a qualifying General composite score does not offset a disqualifying finding under these guidelines.

entry_requirements.asvab_line_score: Electronics (E) MAGE composite ≥ 60, per the official spaceforce.com enlisted careers page (directly fetched 2026-07-12). This matches the MAGE:E composite listed for the space-satellite cluster in data/interest-taxonomy.json.
entry_requirements.security_clearance: Single Scope Background Investigation (SSBI) — the investigative basis for Top Secret/SCI-level clearance eligibility — plus a National Agency Check with Local Agency Checks and Credit Check (NACLC), per spaceforce.com (directly fetched 2026-07-12). This is a genuinely high clearance bar, consistent with the master prompt's expectation that security clearance decides nearly all of this cluster.
